title: Accordion
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Accordion primitive preserving model-owned value state, single and multiple selection, disabled item behavior, Enter and Space keyboard activation, deprecated orientation data attributes, ARIA relationships, panel mounting policy, and root/item/header/trigger/panel data attributes.

deviations.summary: Open item value state is a model-owned input and trigger presses emit value-change facts instead of mutating internal component state.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit preserves unidirectional data flow. Consumers update their model in response to AccordionValueChange payloads.

deviations.summary: Transition status and panel dimensions are explicit inputs rather than DOM-measured internal state.
deviations.rationale: Base UI measures panel dimensions for animated panels. Foldkit registry primitives stay pure and reuse the plan 028 explicit measurement convention.

deviations.summary: The deprecated loopFocus option is accepted as source-evidence API shape but intentionally has no keyboard behavior.
deviations.rationale: Pinned Base UI Accordion deprecates loopFocus and orientation-driven roving focus after the APG update. The Foldkit helper preserves orientation data attributes but does not implement arrow-key focus movement.
